headline: Chevron Iraqi Oilfield Talks And What They Could Mean For CVX Valuation
summary: Chevron, ticker NYSE:CVX, is in talks to acquire stakes in major Iraqi oilfields, potentially taking over positions held by Russian companies. The negotiations center on large producing fields that are important to Iraq's output and to global oil supply. Any agreement could adjust the balance of international players in Iraq's energy sector and influence regional energy ties among the U.S., Russia and China. For investors watching NYSE:CVX, this development comes with the stock trading...

headline: Chevron expands Mediterranean footprint with Malta oil and gas exploration
summary: Chevron (NYSE:CVX) said Tuesday it will begin exploring for oil and gas south of Malta, extending its presence in the Mediterranean region and positioning itself near established producers such as Libya, Italy, and Tunisia. Malta itself currently has no active oil or gas production.

content.title: Chevron expands Mediterranean footprint with Malta oil and gas exploration
content.summary: Chevron (NYSE:CVX) said Tuesday it will begin exploring for oil and gas south of Malta, extending its presence in the Mediterranean region and positioning itself near established producers such as Libya, Italy, and Tunisia. Malta itself currently has no active oil or gas production.

headline: Phony Chevron-Funded Group Blames CA When Chevron's Price Gouging Is Pegged For Run Up At Pump According To New State Gas Pricing Report, Says Consumer Watchdog
summary: Californians for Energy Independence (CEI), a fake, Chevron-funded group is using its $13.7 million Chevron-supplied war chest to run Facebook ads blaming stratospheric prices at the pump on California policies, according to research from the nonprofit Consumer Watchdog.
